vacations.title: Vacations
vacations.subtitle: Plan your trips and keep a history of your family stays.
vacations.confirm_delete: Delete this vacation? This cannot be undone.

form.title: Trip title (e.g. Summer 2026)
form.no_family_members: No family members yet — add some on the Family page.

review.title: Review & summary
review.empty: No review yet. Rate your trip when you're back!
review.text_placeholder: What we loved, would do again, would avoid…

itinerary.title: Itinerary
itinerary.empty: No itinerary yet. Generate a full plan with AI or add days manually.
itinerary.confirm_delete: Delete this day from the itinerary?

ai.error: AI couldn't respond. Try again shortly.
ai.plan_dialog_desc: The AI builds a day-by-day plan with activities, meals and estimated budget.
ai.plan_extra_placeholder: Optional notes: what's already booked, allergies, pace preferences…
ai.plan_disclaimer: AI gives you a draft — double-check addresses and opening hours before booking.
ai.plan_overwrite_warning: An itinerary already exists: generated days will replace current days (same day number).
ai.luggage_dialog_desc: One list per participant (age-aware) + a shared family list, tailored to destination and dates.
ai.luggage_extra_placeholder: Notes: gear already on site, constraints (cabin baggage only, no car…)
ai.luggage_replace: Replace current checklist (otherwise new items are appended)
ai.luggage_disclaimer: Verify official documents (passports, vaccines) with government sources.

integrations.dialog_desc: Pick where to create data linked to this trip. You can always edit or delete it later.
integrations.error: Could not create integrations. Try again.
integrations.budget_desc: Adds a Leisure entry for the planned budget amount, on the start date.
integrations.calendar_desc: Creates an event "Vacation in {destination}" for the trip's date range.
integrations.tasks_desc: Generates 3 tasks (papers D-30, accommodation D-21, packing D-3) assigned to participants.
integrations.budget_no_budget: Budget: no planned amount, nothing created
